title: Message
description: Message schema from Bandwidth messaging API

id.description: The unique identifier for the message

owner.description: The Bandwidth phone number that owns the message

applicationId.description: The application ID associated with this message

time.description: The time the message was created

segmentCount.description: The number of segments the message was split into

media.description: Media URLs attached to the message

text.description: The text content of the message

tag.description: Custom tag attached to the message
